title: EvalRun
description: Top-level persisted artifact written to results/<slug>/<ts>.json for every holodeck test invocation.

report.description: Existing TestReport model (unchanged by this feature). Schema not duplicated here; see src/holodeck/models/test_result.py.

EvalRunMetadata.description: Run provenance. Intentionally omits a 'created_at' field — run ordering and filename derivation use report.timestamp (the existing TestReport.timestamp) as the single source of truth.

agent_config.description: Deep snapshot of the validated Agent model with secrets redacted.
